search.placeholder: Search for a place or city...

favorites.emptyMessage: Tap the star icon to add places to favorites

intro.heading: About Us?
intro.paragraph1: Joylar is an app for discovering interesting places throughout Uzbekistan. It helps you find nature spots, historical places, restaurants, and recreation areas near you.
intro.paragraph2: Our goal is to give people the opportunity to find interesting and memorable places in their own city or when visiting new places. Especially for those who love family recreation, picnics, and nature outings.

whyJoylar.heading: Why Joylar?
points: Automatically find nearby places using geolocation
Filter by categories: nature, historical places, restaurants, and more
Special sections for dachas and family picnic spots
Support in Uzbek, Russian, and English languages

whoBuiltIt.heading: Who built it?
whoBuiltIt.paragraph: This app was created by Doniyor. It was developed to show people the beautiful places of Uzbekistan and promote the culture of recreation.
